title: I was Mentioned in
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to set the widget for the I was mentioned in to “only mentions I have not seen”  Sometimes you do not need to reply.  Or a way to mark them as read from the widget similar to the Update Feed (…

posts.author: jamiecrippin (Jamie Crippin)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to set the widget for the I was mentioned in to “only mentions I have not seen” Sometimes you do not need to reply. Or a way to mark them as read from the widget similar to the Update Feed (Inbox)
